Script.name: G_RemindMe_Script
Script.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- G_RemindMe v1.0 - Mudlet Port (initial) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
G_RemindMe = G_RemindMe or {}
local EVENT_DEFS = { level = { path = "char.status.level", broadcast = "gmcp.char.status" }, remort = { path = "char.base.remorts", broadcast = "gmcp.char.base" }, tier = { path = "char.base.tier", broadcast = "gmcp.char.base" }, qp = { path = "char.worth.qp", broadcast = "gmcp.char.worth" }, tp = { path = "char.worth.tp", broadcast = "gmcp.char.worth" }, trains = { path = "char.worth.trains", broadcast = "gmcp.char.worth" }, pracs = { path = "char.worth.pracs", broadcast = "gmcp.char.worth" }, gold = { path = "char.worth.gold", broadcast = "gmcp.char.worth" }, }
local VALID_OPS = { ["="] = true, [">="] = true, ["<="] = true, [">"] = true, ["<"] = true } local COOLDOWN_SECONDS = 60
local function msg(s) cecho("<gold>[RemindMe] <white>" .. s .. "\n") end local function warn(s) cecho("<tomato>[RemindMe] <white>" .. s .. "\n") end local function okm(s) cecho("<lime_green>[RemindMe] <white>" .. s .. "\n") end local function dbg(s) if G_RemindMe.debug_on then cecho("<dodger_blue>[RM:debug] <white>" .. s .. "\n") end end
local function split_path(path) local t = {} for part in path:gmatch("[^%.]+") do t[#t + 1] = part end return t end
local function gmcp_get(path) if type(gmcp) ~= "table" then return nil end local current = gmcp for _, key in ipairs(split_path(path)) do if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end current = current[key] end return tonumber(current) end
local function evaluate_condition(current, op, target) if current == nil then return false end if op == "=" then return current == target end if op == ">=" then return current >= target end if op == "<=" then return current <= target end if op == ">" then return current > target end if op == "<" then return current < target end return false end
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/g_remindme_state.lua"
local function lua_serialize(value) local t = type(value) if t == "number" or t == "boolean" then return tostring(value) end if t == "string" then return string.format("%q", value) end if t == "table" then local out = {"{"} for k, v in pairs(value) do local key = (type(k) == "string" and k:match("^[%a_][%w_]*$")) and k or ("[" .. lua_serialize(k) .. "]") out[#out + 1] = key .. " = " .. lua_serialize(v) .. "," end out[#out + 1] = "}" return table.concat(out, " ") end return "nil" end
local function save_state() local payload = { reminders = G_RemindMe.reminders, next_id = G_RemindMe.next_id, debug_on = G_RemindMe.debug_on, }
local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. lua_serialize(payload)) f:close() end end
local function load_state() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local loaded = nil local ok, data = pcall(dofile, STATE_FILE) if ok and type(data) == "table" then loaded = data if type(loaded[1]) == "table" and type(loaded.reminders) ~= "table" and tonumber(loaded.next_id) == nil and type(loaded.debug_on) ~= "boolean" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end end if not loaded and type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, data2 = pcall(table.load, STATE_FILE) if ok2 and type(data2) == "table" then loaded = data2 end end end
loaded = loaded or {} G_RemindMe.reminders = type(loaded.reminders) == "table" and loaded.reminders or {} G_RemindMe.next_id = tonumber(loaded.next_id) or 1 G_RemindMe.debug_on = (loaded.debug_on == true) G_RemindMe.cooldowns = {} end
local function display_box(lines, title) local width = #title for _, line in ipairs(lines) do if #line > width then width = #line end end local border = "+" .. string.rep("-", width + 2) .. "+" cecho("<yellow>" .. border .. "\n") cecho(string.format("<yellow>| <red>%-" .. width .. "s<yellow> |\n", title)) cecho("<yellow>" .. border .. "\n") for _, line in ipairs(lines) do cecho(string.format("<yellow>| <white>%-" .. width .. "s<yellow> |\n", line)) end cecho("<yellow>" .. border .. "\n") end
local function check_reminder(reminder) local def = EVENT_DEFS[reminder.event] if not def then return end
local current = gmcp_get(def.path) if current == nil then dbg("No GMCP value for " .. def.path) return end
if evaluate_condition(current, reminder.op, reminder.value) then local now = os.time() local last = G_RemindMe.cooldowns[reminder.id] or 0 if (now - last) >= COOLDOWN_SECONDS then G_RemindMe.cooldowns[reminder.id] = now display_box({ string.format("Event: %s %s %d (current: %d)", reminder.event, reminder.op, reminder.value, current), "Message: " .. reminder.message, }, "REMINDER TRIGGERED") end end end
local function check_reminders_for_event(event_name) for _, reminder in ipairs(G_RemindMe.reminders) do local def = EVENT_DEFS[reminder.event] if def and def.broadcast == event_name then check_reminder(reminder) end end end
function RemindMe_OnGMCP(_, event_name) check_reminders_for_event(event_name) end
function RemindMe_Cmd_Help() msg("Usage: remindme <event> <op> <value> <message>") msg(" remindme <event> <value> <message> (defaults op to >=)") msg("Operators: =, >=, <=, >, <") msg("Examples:") msg(" remindme level >= 90 buy level 90 weapon") msg(" remindme level 90 buy level 90 weapon") msg("Commands: remindme list | events | delete <id> | clear") msg(" remindme clear I AM SURE | debug on|off") msg("Events: level, remort, tier, qp, tp, trains, pracs, gold") end
function RemindMe_Cmd_Events() msg("Available events:") for _, ev in ipairs({ "level", "remort", "tier", "qp", "tp", "trains", "pracs", "gold" }) do cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-10s <gray>%s\n", ev, EVENT_DEFS[ev].path)) end end
function RemindMe_Cmd_List() if #G_RemindMe.reminders == 0 then msg("No reminders set.") return end for _, r in ipairs(G_RemindMe.reminders) do cecho(string.format("<cyan>#%-3d <white>[%s %s %d] <gray>%s\n", r.id, r.event, r.op, r.value, r.message)) end end
function RemindMe_Cmd_Delete(matches) local id = tonumber(matches[2]) if not id then warn("Invalid ID. Usage: remindme delete <id>") return end
for i, r in ipairs(G_RemindMe.reminders) do if r.id == id then table.remove(G_RemindMe.reminders, i) G_RemindMe.cooldowns[id] = nil save_state() okm(string.format("Reminder #%d deleted.", id)) return end end
warn(string.format("Reminder #%d not found.", id)) end
function RemindMe_Cmd_ClearWarning() if #G_RemindMe.reminders == 0 then msg("No reminders to clear.") return end warn("This will delete all reminders. Type: remindme clear I AM SURE") end
function RemindMe_Cmd_ClearConfirmed() local count = #G_RemindMe.reminders if count == 0 then msg("No reminders to clear.") return end G_RemindMe.reminders = {} G_RemindMe.cooldowns = {} save_state() okm(string.format("All reminders deleted. (%d removed)", count)) end
function RemindMe_Cmd_Debug(matches) local onoff = (matches[2] or ""):lower() G_RemindMe.debug_on = (onoff == "on") save_state() okm("Debug mode is now " .. (G_RemindMe.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") end
function RemindMe_Cmd_Add(matches) local event = (matches[2] or ""):lower() local op = matches[3] local value = tonumber(matches[4]) local message = matches[5]
if not op then op = ">=" value = tonumber(matches[6]) message = matches[7] msg("No operator provided; defaulting to >=") end
message = (message or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
if not EVENT_DEFS[event] then warn("Unknown event: " .. event) return end if not VALID_OPS[op] then warn("Invalid operator: " .. tostring(op)) return end if not value then warn("Invalid value. Must be numeric.") return end if message == "" then warn("Please provide a reminder message.") return end
local reminder = { id = G_RemindMe.next_id, event = event, op = op, value = value, message = message, }
table.insert(G_RemindMe.reminders, reminder) G_RemindMe.next_id = G_RemindMe.next_id + 1 save_state()
okm(string.format("Reminder #%d created: %s %s %d -> %s", reminder.id, event, op, value, message)) check_reminder(reminder) end
function RemindMe_Init() load_state()
if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" and not G_RemindMe.handlers_registered then G_RemindMe.handlers_registered = true G_RemindMe.event_handlers = { registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.status", "RemindMe_OnGMCP"), registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.base", "RemindMe_OnGMCP"), registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.worth", "RemindMe_OnGMCP"), } end
msg(string.format("Loaded. %d reminder(s) active.", #G_RemindMe.reminders)) msg("Type 'remindme help' for usage.") end
RemindMe_Init()
